_meta.description: S2 Material Tensor Library for L3 Semantic Layer

clear_glass.instruction: CRITICAL: Disable visual depth. Navigate via mmWave.

mirror_surface.instruction: Ignore visual/LiDAR feature points to prevent map corruption.

high_pile_carpet.instruction: Increase torque by 30%. Disable sweeping side-brushes.

polished_marble.instruction: Limit velocity to 1.0 m/s. Enable anti-slip traction.

step_drop.instruction: CRITICAL: Cliff. Stop and execute 180-degree retreat.

ir_absorbing_surface.instruction: Rely on physical bump and ultrasonic arrays.

metallic_grating.instruction: Filter mmWave noise. Lock caster wheels.

yielding_obstacle.instruction: Treat visual boundaries of beds/sofas as rigid walls.

ceiling.instruction: Ignore for path planning. Use for V-SLAM only.

chandelier.instruction: If overhead lux > threshold, reduce camera exposure.

hanging_fabric.instruction: Evaluate robot height vs clearance height.

hvac_vent.instruction: Used purely for spatial temperature modeling.

ceiling_fan.instruction: Apply temporal smoothing to ignore shadow flicker.

plant_canopy.instruction: Filter out point clouds above z=1.0m to save compute.
